personal.name: Lebo Kharafu
personal.about: I studied Computer Science at University of Witswatersrand. My passion for technology and problem-solving has driven me to explore: Software Development & Design, Cybersecurity, Creative Coding, and recently Machine Learning, where I continuously seek to enhance my skills and knowledge. I am driven by a curiosity to solve complex problems and a commitment to continuous learning. My goal is to one day earn a Turing Award in Computer Science Research.

cards.title: Software Design
cards.description: Building scalable logic and focusing on clean, modular code fundamentals.

cards.title: Creative Coding
cards.description: Playing with and making interactive, visually striking art with code.

cards.title: Computer Science
cards.description: Exploring computational theory with a lifelong aspiration toward a Turing Award or Phd.

cards.title: Machine Learning
cards.description: Training models and exploring AI-driven research solutions.
